_readme: Art slot manifest (spec §11). Each key is an art slot id referenced by events/instruments/accessories/endings. To ship real art: export to assets/art/<slot>.webp at the listed size, then register the path in js/data/assets.js (ASSET_MANIFEST). Placeholders render automatically for any slot without a path — no code changes needed.
_style_brief: Flat, characterful editorial-cartoon look; limited palette; dry-comic energy matching the writing. Consistent protagonist silhouette across all ev_* cards. Never depict or name real living artists or brands.

_notes.ev_open_mic: Dive bar open mic, nacho-scented despair, protagonist clutching janky instrument
_notes.ev_busk: Farmers market corner standoff with a bagpiper (Craig)
_notes.ev_debt: Polite man with clipboard (Curtis), ominous but courteous
_notes.ev_tour: Dying van at night, 'FISH' airbrushed on the side
_notes.ev_stadium: Stadium tunnel POV, wall of light and crowd ahead
_notes.end_burnout: Protagonist at a fintech standing desk, kombucha tap, dead eyes, tiny kazoo in a drawer
_notes.end_megastar_win: Stadium crowd from the stage, name in lights (bus optional)
_notes.end_studio_win: Studio wall of gold records, phone ringing, worn instrument case
_notes.end_hitfactory_win: Mixing console at golden hour, three charting phones face-up
